summary: Comprehensive testing of ICS Calendar Sync feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All ICS sync features working correctly - ICS settings dialog, sync button, ICS badges on events, fine toggle, calendar list/grid views, create event dialog.
seed_data_creation: 37 ICS events synced from Outlook calendar, 2 manual events exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: ICS Calendar Sync feature fully tested. Key tests: 1) GET /api/settings/ics returns ICS settings (admin only), 2) PUT /api/settings/ics updates ICS URL and sync_enabled, 3) POST /api/settings/ics/sync triggers manual sync, 4) PUT /api/events/{id}/fine-toggle toggles fine_enabled, 5) ICS events have source='ics' and ics_uid set, 6) ICS events have fine_enabled=false by default, 7) Manual events have source='manual', 8) Calendar page shows ICS badge on imported events, 9) Calendar page shows sync button (refresh icon) for admin, 10) Calendar page shows settings button (gear icon) for admin, 11) ICS Settings dialog opens with URL field and sync toggle, 12) Event detail dialog shows ICS badge and fine toggle button, 13) Login works with admin/admin123, 14) Calendar list and grid views work, 15) Create event dialog works for manual events, 16) Dashboard, Members, Fines, Statistics pages still work.

backend: GET /api/settings/ics - returns ICS settings (admin only) - PASSED
PUT /api/settings/ics - update ICS URL and sync_enabled (admin only) - PASSED
POST /api/settings/ics/sync - manual sync triggers and imports events - PASSED
ICS events appear in GET /api/events with source='ics' and ics_uid set - PASSED
ICS events have fine_enabled=false by default (no auto-fine) - PASSED
Manual events still have source='manual' - PASSED
Login still works with admin/admin123 - PASSED
frontend: Calendar page loads with list view showing ICS and manual events - PASSED
Calendar page shows ICS badge on imported events - PASSED
Calendar page shows sync button (refresh icon) for admin - PASSED
Calendar page shows settings button (gear icon) for admin - PASSED
ICS Settings dialog opens with URL field and sync toggle - PASSED
ICS Settings dialog shows last sync timestamp - PASSED
Event detail dialog shows ICS badge for ICS events - PASSED
Event detail dialog shows fine toggle button - PASSED
Event detail dialog shows edit and delete buttons for admin - PASSED
Create event dialog works for manual events - PASSED
Manual sync button triggers sync and shows toast - PASSED

notes.daily_sync: Background task runs daily via asyncio on backend startup
notes.fine_toggle: Admin/Spiess/Vorstand can toggle fine logic per imported event
notes.deleted_events: Events deleted in external calendar get deleted in app during sync
